items.english: Keep going straight.
Turn at the first street on the right.
Then turn left.
You arrive exactly in the square.

items.maltese: Fuq in-naħa tal-lemin tal-knisja hemm il-għassa.
items.english: On the right side of the church there is the police station.
Excuse me, where is the pharmacy?
Where is the restaurant?
Is the bank near?

items.maltese: Tista’ tgħidli fejn hi l-għassa tal-pulizija, jekk jogħġbok?
items.english: Could you tell me where the police station is, please?
Go straight on.
Then turn left.
After that, turn right.
The bank is opposite the church.

items.maltese: Imxi sal-kantuniera u dur fuq il-lemin.
items.english: Walk to the corner and turn right.

items.maltese: A: Skużani, fejn hi l-waqfa tal-linja?
items.english: A: Excuse me, where is the bus stop?

items.maltese: B: Mur dritt u iddur fuq il-lemin.
items.english: B: Go straight on and turn right.
B: It is next to the bank.
A: Where is the pharmacy?
B: It is very near.
B: It is opposite the school.
From the bus stop go straight on until the corner.
On the left you will see the bank.
The restaurant is behind the bank.

items.maltese: Il-ħabib tiegħek qiegħed fi Triq Santa Marija. Agħtih direzzjonijiet biex imur quddiem il-ġnien.
items.english: Your friend is in Triq Santa Marija. Give directions so that he goes to the front of the garden.
Excuse me, where is the bank?
Where is the pharmacy?
Where is the bus stop?
Where is the restaurant?
Where is the school?
Go straight on.
Keep going straight on.
Turn left.
Turn right.
Then go straight again.
The bank is very near.
The pharmacy is not far away.
The restaurant is opposite the church.
The bus stop is next to the bank.
The school is behind the garden.
The bank is on the left.
The cafeteria is on the right.
The church is in front of you.
The shop is in the square.
Go until the corner.
After the corner turn right.

items.maltese: Il-librerija hija bejn il-bank u l-iskola.
items.english: The library is between the bank and the school.
Please, can you help me?
Of course, I will help you.
Thank you very much for the help.
You are welcome.
